text:
All about a girl named Marina who had the most remarkable pet bird. It took the name Marlonium.

Marlinium had such an extraordinary personality. In the garden they had planted under Marlinium's bird feeder something peculiar. There was this big, floppy owl that would just roll around all silly-looking throughout the day. Somehow, Marlonium knew just how to play with it.

First, Marlonium would grab a handful of dandelion fluff and roll it around to imitate the owl's calls. Then occasionally, he'd hop over to the owl bobbing in the yard and pretend to eat it.

Marlinium liked to play fetch with twigs. Whenever you threw one into the air, Marlonium would scooped it up, hop around excitedly, and then throw it back.

On weekends they'd go outside in the park. Marlonium would perch next to you while you fed the squirrels. He had this way of just... *zing
